name: Hawaiian Delight Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and cream cheese until smooth.
2. Gradually add the all-purpose flour, beating until well blended.
3. Form the dough into 1-inch balls.
4. Pat each ball into a shell shape on greased muffin pans.
5. Sprinkle half a cup of chopped nuts evenly over each shell.
6. In a separate bowl, beat together the eggs and brown sugar until combined.
7. Stir in the remaining chopped nuts, shredded coconut, and all-purpose flour with baking powder.
8. Fill each shell about halfway with the mixture.
9. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 18 minutes.
10. Reduce the temperature to 250°F and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
